name: Toyo Logistics Co., Ltd.
summary: Toyo Logistics Co., Ltd. engages in the transportation, warehousing, distribution, and real estate businesses in Japan. The company provides international transportation services, including land, sea, and air routes linking Japan to other countries worldwide. It also offers harbor transportation services comprising shipping agency, disposal of exported and imported cargo, marine container transportation, and customs brokerage services, as well as coordinates the storage, distribution, and packing of merchandise of multiple-type/small-lot shipments; and cargo and customs clearance services. In addition, the company provides warehousing and storage services; domestic distribution services; logistics distribution services by truck; and trunk room services. Further, it designs, constructs, and manages various real estate facilities. The company was founded in 1893 and is based in Nagoya, Japan. Toyo Logistics Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Toray Industries, Inc.
